domain.name: travel
domain.description: City travel planning and day-trip itineraries.

task.name: tokyo_1day_plan
task.title: 1-Day Tokyo Travel Plan
task.description: A compact, well-paced one-day itinerary to see Tokyo highlights with transit and meal suggestions.

schema.name: itinerary
schema.description: One-day itinerary with ordered day, points of interest, transit steps, and meals.

root_fields.title: 1-Day Tokyo Highlights
root_fields.summary: A single-day route covering Shibuya, Harajuku/Meiji Shrine, Asakusa, Ueno, and an evening skyline view, with suggested transit and meals for smooth pacing.

fields.theme: Central Tokyo highlights with walking and short trains

fields.name: Shibuya Crossing & Hachiko
fields.description: Start at Shibuya to experience the famous scramble crossing and the Hachiko statue nearby.

fields.name: Train to Harajuku (JR Yamanote)
fields.description: Short JR ride from Shibuya to Harajuku station.
highlights: Arrive near Meiji Shrine and Takeshita Street

fields.name: Meiji Shrine & Yoyogi Park
fields.description: Peaceful walk through the forested approach and visit the shrine grounds.

fields.name: Takeshita Street (Harajuku)
fields.description: Explore youthful fashion shops and crepe stands along the bustling pedestrian street.

fields.name: Lunch in Omotesando/Harajuku
fields.description: Choose a casual sushi spot, ramen, or a trendy cafe along Omotesando.

fields.name: Train to Asakusa (Ginza Line transfer)
fields.description: Change lines to head northeast to Asakusa for traditional Tokyo sights.
highlights: About 25-40 minutes depending on transfer speed

fields.name: Senso-ji Temple & Nakamise
fields.description: Visit Tokyo's oldest temple and browse the Nakamise shopping street for snacks and souvenirs.

fields.name: Short train to Ueno
fields.description: Quick ride to Ueno for park and cultural stops.

fields.name: Ueno Park & Ameyoko Market
fields.description: Stroll the park, visit a museum if desired, and explore the lively Ameya-Yokocho market.

fields.name: Train to Tokyo Skytree area
fields.description: Head east to the Sumida district for evening skyline views.

fields.name: Tokyo Skytree / Sumida Riverside
fields.description: Optional observation deck visit or riverside walk to view the tower at golden hour.

fields.name: Dinner near Skytree or Asakusa
fields.description: Finish with a relaxed dinner: traditional izakaya, tempura, or modern dining with tower views.

user_facing.title: One-Day Tokyo Highlights
user_facing.overview: A compact, walk-and-train plan to see Shibuya, Harajuku, Asakusa, Ueno, and finish with evening skyline views, paced for comfort and photo stops.

sections.title: Morning — Shibuya and Harajuku
sections.summary: Start with the iconic Shibuya crossing, then a peaceful visit to Meiji Shrine followed by vibrant Takeshita Street.
bullets: See Hachiko and the scramble crossing at low morning crowds
Walk through Meiji Shrine and nearby Yoyogi Park
Explore Takeshita Street for unique shops and snacks

sections.title: Midday — Asakusa and Traditional Tokyo
sections.summary: Travel to Asakusa to visit Senso-ji and browse Nakamise for street food and souvenirs.
bullets: Historic temple and photo spots at Kaminarimon
Sample local snacks along Nakamise
Plan ~1 hour to explore comfortably

sections.title: Afternoon — Ueno Park and Market
sections.summary: Short ride to Ueno for park time, optional museums, and the bustling Ameyoko market.
bullets: Stroll Ueno Park or visit a museum if interested
Discover deals and street-food at Ameyoko
Good rest stop before the evening

sections.title: Evening — Skytree and Dinner
sections.summary: Head to the Sumida area for skyline views at Tokyo Skytree and enjoy dinner nearby to end the day.
bullets: Visit observation deck at sunset for best views
Choose a local izakaya or tempura restaurant for dinner
Allow time for transit and possible queues

domain.name: travel
domain.description: City travel planning and day-trip itineraries.

task.name: tokyo_1day_plan
task.title: 1-Day Tokyo Travel Plan
task.description: A compact, well-paced one-day itinerary to see Tokyo highlights with transit and meal suggestions.

task_schema.name: itinerary_cs5
task_schema.description: One-day itinerary with ordered day, points of interest, transit steps, and meals.
task_schema.hierarchy:
Itinerary (root)
    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)
        |-- POI (leaf)
        |-- Transit (leaf)
        `-- Meal (leaf)
task_schema.syntax_rules:
- Paths start with /Itinerary
- Node types: Itinerary, Day, POI, Transit, Meal
- Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]
- Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets

domain_schema.name: travel_domain
domain_schema.description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
domain_schema.hierarchy:
Travel_Root (root)
  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)
      `-- TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)

display.domain_schema:
name: travel_domain
description: Domain container for travel tasks with versions
hierarchy: "Travel_Root (root)\n  `-- Task (container, indexed by @name)\n      `--\
  \ TaskVersion (version, indexed by @number)"
nodes:
  Travel_Root:
    type: root
    fields: []
    children:
    - Task
  Task:
    type: container
    index_attr: name
    fields:
    - title
    - description
    - status
    children:
    - TaskVersion
  TaskVersion:
    type: version
    index_attr: number
    fields:
    - patch_info
    - conversation_history
    - created_at
    children: []
display.task_schema:
name: itinerary_cs5
description: One-day itinerary with ordered day, points of interest, transit steps,
  and meals.
hierarchy: "Itinerary (root)\n    `-- Day (container, indexed by @index)\n       \
  \ |-- POI (leaf)\n        |-- Transit (leaf)\n        `-- Meal (leaf)"
nodes:
  Itinerary:
    type: root
    fields:
    - title
    - summary
    children:
    - Day
  Day:
    type: container
    fields:
    - theme
    children:
    - POI
    - Transit
    - Meal
    index_attr: index
  POI:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Transit:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
  Meal:
    type: leaf
    fields:
    - name
    - time_block
    - description
    - highlights
    children: []
data_files:
  tokyo_1day_plan: memory/travel/tokyo_1day_plan.xml
default_data: tokyo_1day_plan
examples_file: prompts/query_generator/domains/xpath_examples_itinerary_cs5.txt
syntax_rules: '- Paths start with /Itinerary

  - Node types: Itinerary, Day, POI, Transit, Meal

  - Indices: Node[1], Node[-1], Node[1:3]

  - Logical: AND / OR / not() combine predicates WITHIN brackets'
display.memory_xml:
<?xml version="1.0" ?>
<Root>
  <Itinerary_Version number="1">
    <patch_info>cold start initialization</patch_info>
    <conversation_history>1 day travel plan in Tokyo</conversation_history>
    <Itinerary>
      <title>1-Day Tokyo Highlights</title>
      <summary>A single-day route covering Shibuya, Harajuku/Meiji Shrine, Asakusa, Ueno, and an evening skyline view, with suggested transit and meals for smooth pacing.</summary>
      <Day index="1">
        <theme>Central Tokyo highlights with walking and short trains</theme>
        <POI>
          <name>Shibuya Crossing & Hachiko</name>
          <time_block>08:30 - 09:15</time_block>
          <description>Start at Shibuya to experience the famous scramble crossing and the Hachiko statue nearby.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Iconic scramble crossing photos</highlight>
            <highlight>Morning coffee near the station</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Transit>
          <name>Train to Harajuku (JR Yamanote)</name>
          <time_block>09:20 - 09:30</time_block>
          <description>Short JR ride from Shibuya to Harajuku station.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Quick transfer (1 stop)</highlight>
            <highlight>Arrive near Meiji Shrine and Takeshita Street</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Transit>
        <POI>
          <name>Meiji Shrine & Yoyogi Park</name>
          <time_block>09:30 - 10:30</time_block>
          <description>Peaceful walk through the forested approach and visit the shrine grounds.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Traditional shrine atmosphere</highlight>
            <highlight>Short walk in Yoyogi Park</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <POI>
          <name>Takeshita Street (Harajuku)</name>
          <time_block>10:30 - 11:15</time_block>
          <description>Explore youthful fashion shops and crepe stands along the bustling pedestrian street.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Street fashion and sweets</highlight>
            <highlight>Unique shops and souvenirs</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Meal>
          <name>Lunch in Omotesando/Harajuku</name>
          <time_block>11:30 - 12:30</time_block>
          <description>Choose a casual sushi spot, ramen, or a trendy cafe along Omotesando.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Local or fusion options</highlight>
            <highlight>Reserve time for lines</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Meal>
        <Transit>
          <name>Train to Asakusa (Ginza Line transfer)</name>
          <time_block>12:40 - 13:20</time_block>
          <description>Change lines to head northeast to Asakusa for traditional Tokyo sights.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>About 25-40 minutes depending on transfer speed</highlight>
            <highlight>Scenic above-ground segments</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Transit>
        <POI>
          <name>Senso-ji Temple & Nakamise</name>
          <time_block>13:25 - 14:30</time_block>
          <description>Visit Tokyo's oldest temple and browse the Nakamise shopping street for snacks and souvenirs.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Historic temple gate (Kaminarimon)</highlight>
            <highlight>Street-food tasting opportunities</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Transit>
          <name>Short train to Ueno</name>
          <time_block>14:35 - 14:45</time_block>
          <description>Quick ride to Ueno for park and cultural stops.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Fast local connection</highlight>
            <highlight>Arrive near museums and park</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Transit>
        <POI>
          <name>Ueno Park & Ameyoko Market</name>
          <time_block>14:50 - 16:00</time_block>
          <description>Stroll the park, visit a museum if desired, and explore the lively Ameya-Yokocho market.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Cherry trees / green space</highlight>
            <highlight>Market bargains and street snacks</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Transit>
          <name>Train to Tokyo Skytree area</name>
          <time_block>16:10 - 16:40</time_block>
          <description>Head east to the Sumida district for evening skyline views.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Scenic river-area approach</highlight>
            <highlight>Timing good for sunset</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Transit>
        <POI>
          <name>Tokyo Skytree / Sumida Riverside</name>
          <time_block>16:45 - 18:15</time_block>
          <description>Optional observation deck visit or riverside walk to view the tower at golden hour.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Panoramic city views</highlight>
            <highlight>Photo opportunities at dusk</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </POI>
        <Meal>
          <name>Dinner near Skytree or Asakusa</name>
          <time_block>18:30 - 20:00</time_block>
          <description>Finish with a relaxed dinner: traditional izakaya, tempura, or modern dining with tower views.</description>
          <highlights>
            <highlight>Try tempura or yakitori</highlight>
            <highlight>Evening atmosphere and lights</highlight>
          </highlights>
        </Meal>
      </Day>
    </Itinerary>
  </Itinerary_Version>
</Root>
